title: HTTP Client Ownership, Context, Status, Body Limits, and Cleanup · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs http client ownership, context, status, body limits, and cleanup from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reusable bounded context-aware PokéAPI client after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Inject and reuse one configured http.Client or narrow transport port because transports retain connection state and support concurrent use.
Create requests with caller-owned context and derive request deadlines without hiding cancellation behind Background.
Classify success, not found, client, server, redirect, and unexpected status before domain decoding and retain bounded error evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Pokedex Go Roundtripp…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 7022 during a narrow-terminal ranger workflow. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove client reuse, response admission, bounded bodies, context cancellation, and cleanup; no user-visible meaning may rely on color or cursor motion; then inject one redirect, control sequence, file, timeout, or persistence failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use injected RoundTripper and httptest server cases for headers, URL, context, status, body limit, cancellation, and cleanup.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use injected RoundTripper and httptest server cases for headers, URL, context, status, body limit, cancellation, and cleanup.

hints: For Pokedex product engineering and Go Record what required effort · Review Pokedex Go Roundtripper Tes…, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Pokedex Go Roundtripper Tests precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Pokedex product engineering and Go Record what required effort · Review Pokedex Go Roundtripper Tes…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review Go team handles case 6929 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove client reuse, response admission, bounded bodies, context cancellation, and cleanup; failed and canceled commands must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one command, argument, EOF, or output-width condition and preserve the session contract. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use injected RoundTripper and httptest server cases for headers, URL, context, status, body limit, cancellation, and cleanup.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Record what required effort · Review Pokedex Go Roundtripper Tes…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Testing only the returned Pokemon proves request construction and lifecycle.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using injected and roundtripper plus specific case evidence.
